prerequisites: A Smartwaiver account with API access. Generate an API token from the Smartwaiver dashboard to authenticate requests.
A start_date value: the date from which to begin retrieving Smartwaiver records.
A start_date_2 value: a second date used by the connector to bound the date range for retrieval.

authMethods.name: API key
authMethods.summary: Smartwaiver authenticates requests with an API key. Retrieve the key by generating an API token from your Smartwaiver dashboard, and provide it in the connector's api_key secret field.

setupSteps.title: Generate a Smartwaiver API token
setupSteps.body: Sign in to your Smartwaiver dashboard and generate an API token to obtain your API key. This token authenticates requests against the Smartwaiver API at https://api.smartwaiver.com/.

setupSteps.title: Provide the API key
setupSteps.body: Enter the generated token in the api_key field so the connector can authenticate with the Smartwaiver API.

setupSteps.title: Set the date range fields
setupSteps.body: Set start_date to the date from which records should be retrieved, and set start_date_2 to bound the retrieval window. Both fields are required.
